info.name: Slack Web API
info.description:
The Slack Web API is an HTTP-based interface that provides access to all of Slack's platform features. It consists of over 200 methods organized by functional area (chat, conversations, users, files, admin, and more) that apps call over HTTPS with JSON payloads and receive JSON responses. All methods require authentication via OAuth tokens (bot or user) with granular permission scopes, and are subject to tiered rate limits. The Web API supports cursor-based pagination for large result sets and provides consistent error handling across all endpoints.

Contact Support:
 Name: Slack Developer Support

request.description: Checks authentication and tells the caller who they are. Returns information about the token holder including user ID, team ID, and team name.

item.name: Slack Send a Message to a Channel

header.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: chat:write

request.description: Sends a message to a channel, DM, or group conversation. Supports plain text, Block Kit layouts, attachments, threading, and message metadata. Requires the chat:write scope, or chat:write.public to post to channels the bot is not a member of.

header.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: chat:write
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Authentication token. Requires scope: chat:write

request.description: Updates a message in a channel. Both the text and blocks can be updated. Requires the chat:write scope.

header.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: chat:write
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Authentication token. Requires scope: chat:write

request.description: Deletes a message from a channel. Requires the chat:write scope. The message must have been posted by the calling user or bot.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Sends an ephemeral message to a user in a channel, visible only to that user. Requires the chat:write scope.
